summary: Iteration 144: Multi-Tenancy Testing - All 12 test cases PASSED. Backend (15/15 tests passed) and Frontend (SuperAdminPage + RegisterPage) fully verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-tenancy isolation is working correctly - new tenants see empty data for branches, sales, dashboard stats
Super admin (is_super_admin=true) can access all tenant data via /api/admin/* endpoints
get_tenant_filter() correctly returns {} for super admin and {tenant_id: X} for regular users
stamp_tenant() correctly adds tenant_id to new documents
Tenant registration creates both tenant record and admin user with correct tenant_id linkage
seed_data_creation: Multiple test tenants created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 144: Multi-tenancy refactoring verified. All 50+ backend routers now use tenant-scoped queries. Super admin sees all data, regular users see only their tenant's data. New tenant registration via /api/tenants/register creates isolated tenant with zero data.

backend_pytest: test_admin_dashboard_endpoint - PASS (returns total_tenants, active_tenants, total_users, plan_distribution)
test_admin_tenants_list - PASS (returns all tenants with user_count, branch_count)
test_tenant_registration_success - PASS (creates tenant + admin user with correct linkage)
test_tenant_registration_missing_fields - PASS (400 for missing required fields)
test_new_tenant_login - PASS (can login with newly registered credentials)
test_new_tenant_dashboard_stats - PASS (returns zeroed stats for new tenant)
test_new_tenant_branches_empty - PASS (empty list for new tenant)
test_new_tenant_sales_empty - PASS (empty list for new tenant)
test_super_admin_sees_new_tenant - PASS (tenant count increases after registration)
frontend_playwright: Stat cards (Total Tenants, Total Users, Active Tenants) - PASS
Step 1 (Account) visible with all fields - PASS
Step 2 (Company) visible after Continue - PASS (3-step wizard working)
Step 3 (Details) visible with plan selection - PASS

test_2_admin_dashboard.result: Returns total_tenants=11, active_tenants=10, total_users=22, plan_distribution={enterprise:1, starter:10}

test_3_admin_tenants_list.result: Returns list of all tenants with user_count and branch_count populated

test_4_new_tenant_registration.result: POST /api/tenants/register creates new tenant + admin user, returns access_token

test_5_new_tenant_login.result: Newly registered admin can login and receives token with correct tenant_id

test_6_super_admin_sees_all_tenants.result: After new registration, super admin tenant list count increases by 1

test_7_super_admin_page_ui.result: SuperAdminPage loads at /super-admin with stats, plan distribution, and tenant list

test_8_register_page_ui.result: RegisterPage shows 3-step wizard (Account→Company→Details) with all fields working

test_9_new_tenant_dashboard_stats.result: New tenant dashboard stats returns zeroed data (no data from other tenants)

test_10_new_tenant_branches.result: New tenant /api/branches returns empty list (0 branches)

test_11_new_tenant_sales.result: New tenant /api/sales returns empty list (0 sales)

test_12_toggle_tenant_status.result: PUT /api/admin/tenants/{id} with is_active toggles correctly, requires super admin
